name: Central Java (Indonesia)
description: A field bearing the coat of arms of the Province of Central Java with its symbols of rice, cotton, mountains, sea, and a kris.
history: Used by the Provincial Government of Central Java (Provinsi Jawa Tengah) since the formation of the modern province.

features.symbolism: field bearing the provincial coat of arms

features.role: Coat of arms of Central Java
features.symbolism: shield bearing rice ears, cotton, mountains, sea, and a kris dagger — symbolising Central Java's agriculture, geography, and Javanese cultural heritage
